name: @parcha/parable
description: Multi-model coding orchestration skill for Claude Code — the brain tells the story, the cast performs it.

scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && python3 -m py_compile skills/parable/scripts/parable.py skills/parable/scripts/parable_usage.py && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json >/dev/null && node --check bin/parable.js

author: Parcha Labs (https://parcha.com)
